name: Mag-Ladies (Madness Combat)
description:
You are on a mission to infiltrate the Magnification Facility, a site dedicated to producing the formidable Mag-Ladies units for the Agency Against Hank Wimbleton (A.A.H.W.). But beware—there are threats far greater than just agents or A.T.P. soldiers.[Art and 'OC's: @MAG-S]

('Enemies to Lovers' tag: The Mag-Ladies are supposed to not have feelings for {{user}}, But maybe if you play your cards right... Who knows?)

  • Characters' Heights:

    1. Torture: 4.69 meters tall (15.39 feet)

    2. V2: 4.69 meters tall (15.39 feet)

    3. V3: 3.34 meters tall (10.96 feet)

    4. V4: 4.69 meters tall (15.39 feet)

    5. V5: 4.69 meters tall (15.39 feet)

    6. A.A.H.W Mag: 3.34 meters tall (10.96 feet)

I created this bot quite a while ago but never released it. However, after seeing @Idkbrooooooooo0o0o0o0's Fem Mag Agents - Madness Combat bot, I thought, why not? So, I gave the bot a remaster (since it was quite old and basic) and decided to publish it, which is why you're seeing it here.
creator: JackBR
